# Hague Creek Land Brokerage

Hague Creek is a specialized Arizona-based rural land and ranch brokerage helping clients buy, sell, and invest in premium ranches, agricultural parcels, and rural acreage across Arizona.

## Contact Information
- **Name:** Hague Creek Land Brokerage
- **Designated Broker & Owner:** Arthur Hague (AZ DRE License #BR654321000)
- **Physical Address:** 100 E Congress St, Suite 300, Tucson, AZ 85701
- **Phone:** +1-520-555-0190
- **Operating Hours:** Mon-Fri 08:00 AM - 05:00 PM MST

## Core Services & Focus Areas
- **Ranch & Legacy Lands:** Rural ranches, livestock grazing tracts, and recreational acreage.
- **Agricultural Investments:** Crop farming acreage, irrigation basins, and water rights valuation.
- **Due Diligence Support:** APN verification, boundary analysis, topography maps, zoning regulations, and LandID map configuration.

## Service Regions
- Cochise County, AZ
- Pima County, AZ
- Yavapai County, AZ
- Santa Cruz County, AZ
- Maricopa County, AZ
- Tucson metro, AZ
- Phoenix metro, AZ

## Main Navigation / Sitemap Pages
- **Home Page** - https://dev.haguecreek.com/
  - Main landing index targeting Arizona land broker services. Features an interactive land filter widget, landowner testimonials, featured active/sold portfolios, and direct lead consultation triggers.
- **About** - https://dev.haguecreek.com/#about-section
  - Broker profile for Arthur Hague, credentials, license details, and specialized land valuation experience.
- **Properties** - https://dev.haguecreek.com/#listings-section
  - Searchable portfolio of active listings (e.g. Coyote Ridge Ranch) and sold inventory (e.g. San Pedro Ag Valley) detailing APNs, zoning, and water specs.
- **Resources & FAQs** - https://dev.haguecreek.com/#faq-section
  - Local land resources answering common questions on Arizona groundwater basins, AMAs, raw land financing, and interactive mapping.
- **Contact** - https://dev.haguecreek.com/#contact-section
  - Consultation questionnaire and phone details for routing inquiries directly.
